title: Advanced Path Manipulation
description: Build advanced path manipulation utilities using os.path. Determine if a file is a Python script, find the common parent directory of two paths, normalize messy paths with redundant separators, and compute a relative path from a base directory.
hints: Use os.path.splitext() to get the extension, then compare with .lower() to handle case variations.
os.path.commonpath() finds the longest common sub-path of a list of paths.
os.path.normpath() cleans up paths by resolving '..' and '.' and collapsing separators.
os.path.relpath(path, start) computes the relative path from start to path.

testCases.validation:
assert is_python_file('script.py') == True
assert is_python_file('data.csv') == False
